title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Tanker Report - August 13, 2024
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2024-08-13_2024730wet-87w332-rgmm3_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_e4b5e05a7f8e.png
· VLCC Market Back to Year-lows as Activity Slows Down - The VLCC market is once again back to recent lows although it seems to be bottoming as the first half of August concludes. Freight rates for the benchmark Middle East Gulf to China route have declined back to levels seen just a month ago prior to the recent temporary rally in spot rates. The current sentiment in the first two weeks of August mirrors the market conditions experienced during the same period last year.
